page_content:
Formerly: ENCH440.

CHBE442 Chemical and Biomolecular Systems Analysis (3 Credits) Dynamic response applied to process systems. Goals and modes of control, Laplace transformations, analysis and synthesis of simple control systems, closed loop response, dynamic testing. Prerequisite: CHBE424 and CHBE426.

Credit Only Granted for. CHBE442 or ENCH442.
